ksa_text: Knowledge of global data protection regulations and privacy laws, including GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, LGPD, PDPA, and sector-specific privacy obligations, with focus on applicable legal bases for processing and regulatory enforcement.

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-K-002 (Security and Privacy/Knowledge) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.444, highest: O*NET at 0.444). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Domain-level data product ownership: data mesh principles, data contracts, domain model governance, inter-domain data agreements, and data product SLA management within a business domain.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.444, and Security and Privacy (SP) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Security and Privacy KSA (composite 0.444)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Domain Data Product Owner job postings does not surface this Security and Privacy competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
